# SubscriptionFilter.TaskIds property

The task ids to receive `notifications/tasks` status pushes for (§25.10, R-25.10-b). Each element MUST be a `taskId` the client holds (R-25.10-c). Honored ONLY when the Tasks extension is active for the `subscriptions/listen` request; supplying it without the negotiated tasks capability MUST yield `-32003` (R-25.10-e). Absent/empty ⇒ no task pushes.

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<string>? TaskIds { get; set; }
```
